与异种生物的战争结束后，幸存下来人们建立起钢铁要塞，他们自称幸存者。几十年弹指一挥间，再无人知晓当年究竟发生了什么，他们只能通过遗留下来的资料得知曾经的辉煌。很多人苦苦追寻，希望找出异种存在之谜，为百年消失的时代画一个句号。他叫方以言，无数幸存者的其中之一，他打算成为一名职业猎人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc26560639c687486c4f6aa08783a189e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"壶杯","author_id":"","book_id":"7486428199828605976","book_name":"百年断层","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1850人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7486428205348291096","read_count":"1850","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1123029"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"526","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc26560639c687486c4f6aa08783a189e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779163715&x-signature=9X5FtWuA50Y1pRLneECpcLFIAqY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1349808956646359","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201208359272EF7AE6AC6015F0FC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":20747,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24947,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2548},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1754631611,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comme
